intro: Hand-picked job portals where job seekers can apply and actually get callbacks. Organized by region (India, Global, Remote, country-specific) and by audience (freshers, experienced, startups, freelance). Every link is verified to be active. Some require free signup to apply; none of them charge job seekers.

portals.name: Naukri.com
portals.description: India's largest job portal — most recruiters use it. Strong for IT, BFSI, sales, and engineering across experience levels.

portals.name: LinkedIn
portals.description: Best for tech, product, and management roles in India. Easy Apply, recruiter outreach, and salary insights.

portals.name: Indeed India
portals.description: Massive aggregator pulling from career pages + direct postings. Filters for fresher, work-from-home, and Saturday-off.

portals.name: Shine.com
portals.description: HT Media's portal. Strong in non-metro hiring and across BPO, sales, retail, and admin roles.

portals.name: Foundit (Monster India)
portals.description: Rebranded from Monster. Decent for mid-senior IT and BFSI; good salary calculator.

portals.name: TimesJobs
portals.description: Times of India's job board. Long-running, mostly mid-senior roles and government / PSU listings.

portals.name: Glassdoor India
portals.description: Apply + read company reviews, salaries, and interview questions in one place. Great for due diligence.

portals.name: Quikr Jobs
portals.description: Blue-collar, hourly, and entry-level roles across Indian cities.

portals.name: Internshala
portals.description: India's top internship + fresher job portal. Stipend-paid internships, work-from-home roles, and free training programs.

portals.name: FreshersWorld
portals.description: Walk-ins, off-campus drives, govt-job notifications, and fresher openings across India.

portals.name: Apna
portals.description: Mobile-first job app. Strong in Tier-2/3 cities, sales, BPO, delivery, retail — direct chat with recruiters.

portals.name: Hirect India
portals.description: Direct chat with founders/hiring managers. Mostly startup and tech roles for early-career candidates.

portals.name: CutShort
portals.description: AI-matched tech jobs for early-to-mid career engineers. Skills-based filtering.

portals.name: Unstop (formerly Dare2Compete)
portals.description: Hackathons, case competitions, internships, and fresher hiring drives. Great for college students.

portals.name: LetsIntern
portals.description: Internships and entry-level openings — finance, marketing, design, and consulting.

portals.name: Hello Intern
portals.description: Curated internships and trainee programs across India.

portals.name: Instahyre
portals.description: Curated, invite-only-feeling listings. Recruiter response rates are high. Strong for product startups.

portals.name: Wellfound (AngelList Talent)
portals.description: Apply directly to startups globally — including thousands in India. Salary + equity shown upfront.

portals.name: Cutshort
portals.description: Product-startup-friendly. AI-skill matching and direct founder access.

portals.name: Iimjobs
portals.description: Premier portal for MBA / consulting / product / finance roles at mid-senior level.

portals.name: Hirist
portals.description: Tech-only sibling of iimjobs. Backend, frontend, DevOps, data — mid-senior.

portals.name: Hasjob (HasGeek)
portals.description: Tech community job board run by HasGeek. Authentic startup postings, no spam.

portals.name: Topmate Jobs
portals.description: Curated openings shared by industry mentors — often before they hit LinkedIn.

portals.name: LinkedIn Jobs
portals.description: The default global job platform. Easy Apply, recruiter messaging, and salary data in every market.

portals.name: Indeed
portals.description: The world's largest job aggregator. 250M+ unique visitors / month. Filters for remote, salary, employer rating.

portals.name: Glassdoor
portals.description: Jobs + transparent salaries + interview reviews. Indispensable for company research before applying.

portals.name: Monster
portals.description: Long-running global board. Strongest in US, Canada, and EU for mid-senior roles.

portals.name: ZipRecruiter
portals.description: AI-matched US roles. One-click apply across hundreds of postings; mobile-first UX.

portals.name: SimplyHired
portals.description: Aggregator with strong filtering by salary, commute, and remote options.

portals.name: CareerBuilder
portals.description: US-focused board with resume builder and skills assessments built in.

portals.name: JobBank (Google for Jobs)
portals.description: Google Jobs surfaces postings from across the web — search 'jobs near me' or '[role] jobs [city]'.

categories.title: 🏠 Remote-First & Work-From-Anywhere
categories.audience: Anyone wanting fully-remote, often international roles

portals.name: We Work Remotely
portals.description: The largest remote-only job board. Programming, design, marketing, customer support, sales.

portals.name: Remote.co
portals.description: Hand-curated remote roles plus advice articles. Strong in mid-senior tech and ops.

portals.name: RemoteOK
portals.description: Indie hacker–popular board. Salary shown in most listings; lots of US-pay-anywhere-remote roles.

portals.name: Working Nomads
portals.description: Curated digest of remote openings, emailed weekly. Engineering, design, and marketing focus.

portals.name: JustRemote
portals.description: Filterable remote board with a 'no-bullshit' policy on listings — every role is truly remote.

portals.name: Remotive
portals.description: Active community + remote board. Free job alerts and a Slack community for remote workers.

portals.name: FlexJobs
portals.description: Premium curated board ($15/mo) with verified remote and flexible roles — zero scam listings.

portals.name: Pangian
portals.description: Global remote network. Curated roles + community + courses.

portals.name: Jobspresso
portals.description: Hand-vetted remote jobs. Tech, marketing, and customer support categories.

portals.name: NoDesk
portals.description: Curated remote jobs + resources for distributed teams.

portals.name: Himalayas
portals.description: Modern remote job board. Strong filters for timezone, salary, and benefits.

portals.name: Dynamite Jobs
portals.description: Remote roles at bootstrapped + profitable companies. Quality over quantity.

categories.title: 💻 Tech & Engineering
categories.audience: Software engineers, data scientists, ML/AI, DevOps

portals.name: Hired.com
portals.description: Companies apply to YOU. Free for candidates; tech-focused with upfront salary + equity.

portals.name: Otta (Welcome to the Jungle)
portals.description: Curated tech roles at startups and scale-ups, mostly UK/EU/US. Modern, transparent listings.

portals.name: Dice
portals.description: Tech jobs in the US — strong for contract, federal, and security-clearance roles.

portals.name: Built In
portals.description: Tech jobs at US startups by city (NYC, SF, LA, Boston, Chicago, Austin, etc.).

portals.name: Toptal
portals.description: Top-3% network — rigorous screening. High pay rates for freelance dev / design / finance work.

portals.name: Triplebyte (Karat)
portals.description: Take a tech assessment once, get matched to companies. US-focused; fully remote options.

portals.name: AI-Jobs.net
portals.description: AI / ML / data science only. Global, with strong remote and visa-sponsorship filtering.

portals.name: MLJobs.io
portals.description: Curated machine-learning openings across research, applied, and infrastructure roles.

portals.name: HackerRank Jobs
portals.description: Solve coding challenges to unlock interviews at the host companies.

portals.name: Stack Overflow Talent
portals.description: Aggregated developer roles surfaced via Stack Overflow's profile + tag system.

categories.title: 🌱 Startups (Global)
categories.audience: Anyone wanting equity-bearing roles at early-stage companies

portals.name: Wellfound (AngelList Talent)
portals.description: The flagship startup job platform. Apply with one profile to thousands of seed–Series-C startups.

portals.name: Y Combinator Work at a Startup
portals.description: All YC-backed companies (1000+) hiring in one place. High signal.

portals.name: Crunchboard
portals.description: Job board from TechCrunch. Startup roles across functions, US-skewed.

portals.name: Startup Jobs (startup.jobs)
portals.description: Massive aggregator of openings at funded startups worldwide.

portals.name: Underdog.io
portals.description: Apply to 50+ startups with one profile. NYC, SF, LA, remote.

portals.name: VentureLoop
portals.description: Openings at venture-backed companies. Categorized by stage and function.

portals.name: BuiltIn (Startups section)
portals.description: Filter by 'startup' tag to see early-stage roles by US tech-hub city.

categories.title: 🌏 Country-Specific (US, UK, EU, APAC, Canada, Australia)
categories.audience: Looking for visa-sponsored, on-site, or local roles outside India

portals.name: USAJobs.gov
portals.description: US federal government openings — Department of Defense, NASA, civilian agencies, GS pay scale.

portals.name: Reed.co.uk
portals.description: UK's most-used job board across all sectors. Strong for finance, tech, and graduate schemes.

portals.name: TotalJobs
portals.description: UK-focused, all industries. Owned by Stepstone group.

portals.name: CV-Library
portals.description: UK board with 5M+ candidates. Filtered job alerts + CV uploads.

portals.name: StepStone (Germany)
portals.description: Largest German job board. Strong for engineering, finance, and Mittelstand roles.

portals.name: Welcome to the Jungle (FR/EU)
portals.description: Modern, visual EU job board. Strong in France, Germany, Spain, UK tech scenes.

portals.name: Jooble
portals.description: Multi-country aggregator (US, UK, India, Brazil, 70+ countries). Localized filters.

portals.name: Adzuna
portals.description: Aggregator across 20+ countries with salary stats and trend graphs.

portals.name: EuropeRemotely
portals.description: Remote roles specifically within EU timezones.

portals.name: Seek (Australia / NZ)
portals.description: The #1 job site in Australia and New Zealand. All sectors, all experience levels.

portals.name: JobStreet (SE Asia)
portals.description: Major board across Malaysia, Singapore, Philippines, Indonesia, Vietnam, Hong Kong.

portals.name: Wantedly (Japan)
portals.description: Japan-focused, startup-friendly. Many roles open to English-speaking talent.

portals.name: Job Bank Canada
portals.description: Government of Canada's official job board — includes LMIA/work-permit roles.

portals.name: Indeed (country versions)
portals.description: Indeed runs localized sites for 60+ countries — switch via the worldwide page.

portals.name: Upwork
portals.description: Largest freelance marketplace — software, design, writing, admin. Compete on hourly or fixed-price bids.

portals.name: Fiverr
portals.description: Sell productized 'gigs' starting at $5. Strong for design, writing, video, and voiceover.

portals.name: Freelancer.com
portals.description: Global freelance marketplace with contests and project bidding.

portals.name: Toptal
portals.description: Top-3% gated network. Premium pay rates for senior software / design / finance freelancers.

portals.name: Guru.com
portals.description: Long-running freelance platform. Lower competition than Upwork in some categories.

portals.name: PeoplePerHour
portals.description: UK-rooted freelance marketplace. Strong in design and digital marketing.

portals.name: Contra
portals.description: 0% commission freelance platform — keep 100% of your pay. Designer-friendly UI.

portals.name: Arc.dev
portals.description: Remote-only platform for senior developers. Permanent + contract roles, vetted.

portals.name: Braintrust
portals.description: User-owned freelance network. Skip the middleman — clients pay full rate.

portals.name: Workana
portals.description: LatAm + Spanish-speaking freelance marketplace, also accepts international talent.

categories.title: 🎯 Internships, Diversity & Niche Boards
categories.audience: Students, women returning to work, underrepresented groups

portals.name: Handshake
portals.description: Internship platform used by 1500+ US universities. Free for students with .edu email.

portals.name: WayUp
portals.description: Entry-level and internship roles in the US — Fortune 500 + startups.

portals.name: Chegg Internships
portals.description: Search internships by location, industry, and remote — US-focused.

portals.name: JobsForHer
portals.description: Indian platform for women returning to work, including part-time and remote options.

portals.name: HerKey (formerly Sheroes)
portals.description: India-focused career platform for women, with mentorship and upskilling.

portals.name: PowerToFly
portals.description: Global platform for women + non-binary candidates in tech and leadership.

portals.name: Tech Ladies
portals.description: Curated job board for women in tech, with a strong community + newsletter.

portals.name: Diversity.com
portals.description: US board focused on roles at companies with strong diversity programs.

portals.name: Recruit Disability
portals.description: US board for candidates with disabilities — partnered with major employers.

portals.name: VetJobs
portals.description: Free job placement service for US military veterans, spouses, and active-duty members.
